title: crocus reticulatus subvar. reflexus
intro: Crocus reticulatus subvar. reflexus, a lesser-known variety of the Crocus genus, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Greece. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Crocus reticulatus subvar. reflexus include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and bulbs are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
